Grandma's Chocolate Cake

This rich, fudgy chocolate cake has been in our family for generations. It's perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or just because.

Ingredients

  • 2 cups all-purpose flour
  • 2 cups sugar
  • 3/4 cup unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 2 teaspoons baking soda
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 cup buttermilk
  • 1 cup hot coffee

Instructions

  1. Preheat oven to 350F. Grease and flour two 9-inch round pans.
  2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, cocoa, and baking soda.
  3. Add eggs, buttermilk, and coffee. Mix until smooth.
  4. Divide between pans and bake 30-35 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
